channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Slabs that have been ‘Fixed’ are not fixed and are rocking still., 10th March
item.description:
Rocking slabs still rocking and when they lifted the slabs they damaged the concrete fillet around the water meter and didn’t fix it, left broken cement all over the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silverdale Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bio hazard. Opened Amazon package leaking motor oil, 10th March
item.description:
It looks to be a stolen Amazon package that was opened and abandoned in the kerb. It has started to leak, and can clearly see it is 5w30 motor oil. Located on corner of Altash Way between The Underwood and park footpath, on the side of bungalow.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Underwood, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th March
item.description:
Fly tipping is back at this location!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rendlesham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 10th March
item.description:
Dead fox placed in bag within a towel.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Overhill Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish after car meet, 10th March
item.description:
The rubbish was there when I went to work yesterday- assuming it happened over the weekend. The rubbish is right next to the pond and it’s a danger to wildlife

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Innova Way, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 10th March
item.description:
Please can you fill this pothole we have a few along this road and due to the buses going over it, it causes huge vibrations and noise.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Station Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Sainspurys shopping trolley, 10th March
item.description:
Abandoned Sainspurys shopping trolley appeared yesterday evening

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Lower Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling again, 10th March
item.description:
Repeated dog fouling. In 5 spots in this specific area. This is now getting ridiculous. The owner of this dog doesn't care.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Darenth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped around the bus stop and pavement, 10th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped around the bus stop and pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Wickham Lane, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped mattress, 10th March
item.description:
Mattress, bits of wood and a black sack dumped at end of Troughton Road overnight. This area needs a camera and some enforcement. Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 10th March
item.description:
Dog fouling. This is a big issue in this area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Darenth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic bins overflowing, 10th March
item.description:
Domestic bin used by residents in my block of flats at 3 boundary lane has not been getting collected in at least the past week and has been filled to overflowing. Please collect the overflow and reinstate regular bin collection at 3 boundary lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Camberwell Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Some idiot fly-tipping waste, 10th March
item.description:
First observed this morning (Tuesday 10 March)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lytchet Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped in Chequers Way N13 6DA, 10th March
item.description:
Someone has dropped this rubbish in Chequers Way near the junction with Pasteur Gardens

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pasteur Gardens, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple holes along this stretch of road, 10th March
item.description:
There are multiple holes along this part of the road. Some quite deep.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Links Side, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain overflowing, 10th March
item.description:
Drain has been overflowing for a long time. Despite reports on this website, it is not fixed and continues to overflow.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, West Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain overflowing, 10th March
item.description:
Drain has been overflowing for a long time. Despite reports on this website, it is not fixed and continues to overflow.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, West Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large deep pothole, 10th March
item.description:
A very large pothole that’s very deep is here. It’s right in centre of the lane of the road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Links Side, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned nitrous oxide canisters, 10th March
item.description:
There are a huge amount of nitrous oxide canisters on the grass verge and the location is very near to a school.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 489, Footscray Road, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights not working, 10th March
item.description:
Traffic lights on the junction of Birchwood Road and Maidstone Road are completely off. 10th March 2026.
Report on FixMyStreet
